jobs.title: Senior Caregiver
jobs.salary_range: Caregiver for summer jobs Attendo Peltolaa Akase We are here for you! At Attendo, we are on a journey home. It means that we want to be, above all, a home for our lovely seniors. Over the past few years, we have succeeded in increasing our management, customer experience and meetings by investing in our neighbor and resident satisfaction as well as our staff satisfaction to a historic peak. As an Attendant, you are an important part of this task. With the help of your work, the residents of our Attendo homes enjoy a good, high-quality everyday life. What will you be able to do?To take care of our seniors in a comprehensive way. during working hours, if necessary there can be more hours. The job is a 3-shift job and we can agree with you on the start time of the employment relationship, however, the work starts at the beginning of June at the latest. Get to know our everyday life on Instagram: Attendo Peltola For summer work you must have: Nursing qualification Hygienic pass (you still have time to complete it before the start of the summer work) Vaccination protection as referred to in Section 48 of the Infectious Diseases Act for the entire duration of the employment Criminal record extract for employment lasting more than three months Sote professional card i.e. certificate Valid medical licenses or you can still complete them with us before the work begins Local nurses are warm-hearted team workers who take on tasks boldly and get excited about new ideas. Customer orientation, friendliness and sense of responsibility describe well these iron professionals in the care industry. They take responsibility independently and bring positive, helpful energy to our teams. At Peltola, all employees have the same value and each one is considered individually. We have a diamond work team and absolutely wonderful residents. What do we offer you? We walk by your side With Attendo, your supervisor is not far away, but present in everyday life, supporting and walking by your side. With us, you are an important part of the multiprofessional team that makes the home a home for our residents. We support your development. With Attendo, development opportunities are real, not just talk. We have a wide range of training, and we encourage all our employees to train and, if they wish, to advance in their careers. We are flexible with you Balance between working life and other life is important to us. With us, you can influence your work shifts and fit your work into different phases of your life. Summer employee benefits also include: Edenred (€100) 2 months of employment in June-August Free coffee and tea Cheap workplace meals In terms of employment and salary, we follow the collective agreement of the private social service industry. The salary range for the position is G20C with 80% working time €1,932.61/month - €2,089.86/month depending on your years of experience. Please note that we are a non-smoking workplace. Are you interested? Apply for us as a colleague! The application period is until May 17, 2026, but don't wait, take advantage of the opportunity to become part of our team, we will fill the position as soon as a suitable applicant is found! More information about the task can be obtained from the manager of the Attendo home. Please send your job application only through the recruitment system. When submitting the application, you can also answer a short video question if you wish. Here for you, the contact information of the manager of the Attendo home: Jaana Salmelajaana.1.salmela@attendo.fip. 0444941710 At the end of the recruitment process, we will send a short question with which we will measure the applicants' satisfaction with our recruitment process. Attendo The leader in future care Attendo is the leading provider of care services in the Nordic countries. Our task is to strengthen people so that everyone who lives with us gets to live a full life in their own way. We offer care and housing services for the elderly, the developmentally disabled, the disabled, those in substance abuse and mental health rehabilitation, and those in need of therapy. For our residents, we are above all a home, a partner for our stakeholders and a strong force for change in society. More than 18,000 of our employees serve in more than 400 offices around Finland. We strengthen people. We look forward. We will solve together. We are Attendo. For our residents, we are above all a homewww.attendo.fi

jobs.title: Responsible nurse
jobs.salary_range: Are you a social and health care professional looking for new career opportunities? Would you like to work in a meaningful position in a Finnish family business? Are you a team player with a positive attitude towards growth? Awesome, read more! We are now looking for you NURSE for permanent, full-time employment at Solum Toukolakoti in Rajamäki (Nurmijärvi). Solum Toukolakoti is a 60-bed 24-hour residential service unit for the elderly, opened in the fall of 2025. With us, help and care is available around the clock, and individual care continues until the last moments of life. We want to invest in a safe and good everyday life, where the resident's right to self-determination is respected. The duties of the nurse in charge in a nutshell: responsibility for the entirety of medical treatment and drug licenses training and guiding workers daily organization developing nursing work and introducing nursing skills administrative work deputizing for the head of the unit as an assistant head of the unit if necessary also basic nursing We expect from you: suitable for the position education at least five years of work experience as a nurse experience of working in aged care and the ability to assess the need for care good organizational skills and independent working attitude good IT skills motivation for development work and building a good everyday life in a nursing home meeting and interaction skills team work skills and a positive attitude Passed medical exams are considered an advantage. The job requires a social security occupational card, vaccination protection required by Section 48 of the Infectious Diseases Act, and a criminal record extract for working with the elderly. We offer you: meaningful work human-value services support of multi-skilled colleagues at work physical activity, culture and well-being benefits occupational health care that is more extensive than Epass's legal requirements Career development opportunities at Terveystalo in a strong growing in the group The salary for the position is based on the collective agreement of the private social service sector and is between €3053.54 - €3331.25/month, depending on your experience and skills. Interested? Great! Please send your application from the link below by May 10, 2026. For more information, please contact Anni Nwaeze on 044 902 2287 during office hours on weekdays. If your call is not answered immediately, please leave a message and we will call you or call again later. Please note that we cannot receive applications sent by e-mail for data protection reasons. Solum is a Finnish family business originally from Jyväskylä, which was founded in 1994. We have grown enormously and today our operations cover the whole of Finland. We work with mental health, child protection, immigration, and service housing for the elderly. At the moment, we have more than 500 professionals working in various jobs. We are constantly looking for social and health care professionals to be part of our growing team. Come and do meaningful work with human-worthy services!
